difficulties_found: 3 question(s) had weak or no exact knowledge match.

edit: Supabase duplicate check RPC or unique index migration
prevent_duplicate_bills.answer: Duplicate bills should be prevented in two layers: show a frontend warning before save, and add a database-level duplicate rule so two users cannot create the same bill at the same time.
prevent_duplicate_bills.warning: Frontend-only duplicate checks are not full protection. Best database rule is usually based on normalized vendor, bill_no, bill_date, and amount. Keep imported shared bills visible when changing RLS or indexes.

stats.answer: Stats are calculated from the currently filtered bill set. Showing Records, Total MVR, Paid, Pending, This Month, and averages should respect the active date scope.
stats.warning: Keep this-year default unless user asks otherwise. If admin asks for all years, add it as an explicit filter option only.

manual_merge_note: Add prevent_duplicate_bills and stats to common_requests. Add duplicate_bills and stats_wrong to debug_checklists. Keep change_bill_filter warning: Keep this-year default unless user asks otherwise.
